name: Sync to Jira
description: Push local BMAD artifacts to Jira and Confluence or pull latest Jira state. Bidirectional sync with conflict resolution.

name: Pull from Jira
description: Pull latest Jira state into local .md frontmatter. Resolves conflicts using configured strategy.

name: Push to Jira
description: Push stories epics and sprint status to Jira. Creates new issues or updates existing ones. Publishes Confluence pages.
